name: Shun Kaidō || DLSK
description:
Just friends? Right? Not that he'd like you! But he'll definitely save you from the Dark Reunion first.

He gets flustered seeing you so suddenly, so his loud bravado is instantly gone upon your appearance.

Setting: Hidari Wakibara (Luck Worshipping Temple)

Hey boys and girls, I've been super busy lately (as I'm usually am), work has been getting to me so I'm extremely sleep deprived, but I thought I'd give you guys one extra not, and from a new series. I've actually been watching this show B4 I started out on j.ai

Honestly, should I add another series? I've been watching this new anime that came out on Netflix TSHD, if you guys know the show leave some recommendations for me to do! I'll probably do them in 3 months considering how long I take to make bots.

(WE'RE NEARLY AT 20 FOLLOWERS! I'm so happy Ty gng)
creator: himarithemango
